people.tiZh: Snap 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founded Snapchat at 21 and turned down Zuckerberg. Has spent a decade betting Snap on camera, AR glasses and now AI as the platform after the smartphone.
people.bioZh: 21 岁创立 Snapchat 并拒绝了扎克伯格的收购。十年押注相机、AR 眼镜与 AI，赌智能手机之后的下一代计算平台。

episodes.tEn: Evan Spiegel on Gen Z, Snapchat's Vision, and the Future of Tech
Snap CEO on Spectacles, AI, and the Future of Computing
Why Building a Durable Social Consumer Product Is So Hard
Evan Spiegel on Snapchat's Origin and AR Future
Evan Spiegel: From Introvert to Snapchat Billionaire
Snapchat Founder Evan Spiegel on TikTok, Wearables, and Being Copied

views.en: Ephemerality reduces social pressure and mirrors natural conversation, enabling authentic communication.
views.zh: 2025年，Spiegel强调阅后即焚降低社交压力，模拟自然对话，促进真实交流。

views.en: Copying by competitors validates innovation; focus on ecosystems and hardware for durable moats.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，Spiegel认为被抄袭证明创新成功，但应通过生态和硬件构建持久护城河。

views.en: AI accelerates prototyping and shifts value from execution to creativity; authentic content remains key.
views.zh: 2026年，Spiegel指出AI加速原型制作，价值从执行转向创意，但真实内容仍不可替代。

views.en: AR glasses should anchor content in the real world, not be notification-based; smartphones persist.
views.zh: 2026年，Spiegel主张AR眼镜应锚定现实世界内容，而非推送通知；智能手机仍将存在。

views.en: EQ surpasses IQ in AI age; long-term investment in youth is key for national success.
views.zh: 2026年，Spiegel认为AI时代情商比智商更重要，长期投资年轻人是国家成功关键。

people.tiZh: Figma 首席设计官
people.bioEn: Loredana Crisan is Chief Design Officer at Figma, where she leads design across the company's products and its push into AI-assisted design. She previously spent nearly a decade at Meta, where she was VP of Design and led design for Messenger.
people.bioZh: Loredana Crisan 是 Figma 首席设计官,负责公司全线产品设计并主导其向 AI 辅助设计的演进。她此前在 Meta 工作近十年,曾任设计副总裁并负责 Messenger 的设计。

episodes.tEn: Putting Soul into AI Design: Figma's CDO on Music, Intuition, and the Future

people.tiZh: 《AI 2027》作者 · 前 OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Former OpenAI governance researcher who gave up millions in equity to keep his freedom to speak, then co-authored the AI 2027 scenario forecasting superintelligence timelines.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 治理研究员，为保留发声自由放弃数百万美元股权，后合著《AI 2027》，对超级智能时间表做情景推演。

episodes.tEn: AI's Existential Threat and the Race for Superintelligence

people.tiZh: OpenAI 算力负责人 · 前英特尔 CTO
people.bioEn: Leads OpenAI compute buildout after serving as Intel CTO and Stanford professor of EE and CS, working at the intersection of networking, systems and AI infrastructure.
people.bioZh: 现主管 OpenAI 的算力扩建，曾任英特尔 CTO、斯坦福大学电子工程与计算机科学教授，长期研究网络、系统与 AI 基础设施的交叉。

episodes.tEn: The Largest Infrastructure Build in History: Inside OpenAI's Compute Strategy
episodes.podEn: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck

people.tiEn: VP Applied Deep Learning Research, NVIDIA
people.tiZh: NVIDIA 应用深度学习研究副总裁
people.bioEn: Leads NVIDIA applied deep learning research and the Nemotron open-model effort; his early GPU deep learning work helped spark cuDNN.
people.bioZh: 负责 NVIDIA 应用深度学习研究与 Nemotron 开源模型；早年的 GPU 深度学习工作催生了 cuDNN。

episodes.tEn: Open Source AI: Efficiency, Innovation, and the External Brain
episodes.podEn: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck

people.tiZh: Instagram 负责人
people.bioEn: Head of Instagram, steering a two-billion-user product through the AI content wave with an emphasis on taste, authenticity and creator trust.
people.bioZh: Instagram 负责人，在 AI 内容洪流中带领这款二十亿用户的产品，强调品味、真实性与创作者信任。

episodes.tEn: Adam Mosseri on AI, Taste, and the Future of Product Teams at Instagram

people.tiZh: Anthropic 平台产品负责人
people.bioEn: Leads Anthropic platform and API products, building the developer ecosystem around Claude as an open ecosystem rather than a walled garden.
people.bioZh: 负责 Anthropic 平台与 API 产品，围绕 Claude 构建开发者生态，主张开放生态而非围墙花园。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic Platform: From Knowledge to Execution to Coordination

people.tiZh: Engram 联合创始人；记忆与持续学习
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Engram, a lab building around memory and continual learning for AI. Researcher focused on how models retain and update knowledge over time.
people.bioZh: Engram 联合创始人，该实验室专注 AI 的记忆与持续学习。研究模型如何随时间保留并更新知识。

episodes.tEn: From Special Forces to AI: Dan Biderman's Journey
Memory and Continual Learning: The Next Frontier in AI

views.en: Future AI is many personalized models, not one giant frontier model; internalizing knowledge into weights enables associative recall.
views.zh: 2026年6月：未来AI是许多个性化模型，而非一个巨型前沿模型；将知识内化到权重中能实现联想式回忆。

views.en: Continual learning and memory internalization are key bottlenecks; models must learn new context autonomously.
views.zh: 2026年6月至7月：持续学习与记忆内化是关键瓶颈；模型必须自主学习新上下文。

views.en: Efficiency and intelligence are inseparable; doing more with less enables solving harder long-horizon tasks.
views.zh: 2026年7月：效率与智能密不可分；用更少资源做更多事才能解决更难的长期任务。

views.en: Pre-training's compression magic should apply to enterprise data; personalized models run on-device.
views.zh: 2026年7月：预训练的压缩魔法应应用于企业数据；个性化模型在设备端运行。

views.en: Scaling with more compute is not the only path; next paradigm requires doing more with less.
views.zh: 始终：增加算力的规模扩张并非唯一路径；下一范式需要以更少资源做更多事。

people.tiZh: Modal 首席技术官
people.bioEn: CTO of Modal, building serverless infrastructure for AI workloads, from GPU functions to sandboxes for coding agents.
people.bioZh: Modal 首席技术官，为 AI 工作负载构建无服务器基础设施，从 GPU 函数到编码智能体沙箱。

episodes.tEn: From Developer to Agent Experience: The Modal Origin Story

people.tiZh: 亚马逊 AGI 实验室认知科学家
people.bioEn: Cognitive scientist at the Amazon AGI lab studying why agents misread human intent, bringing developmental psychology and language research into AI.
people.bioZh: 亚马逊 AGI 实验室认知科学家，研究智能体为何误解人类意图，把发展心理学与语言研究带入 AI。

episodes.tEn: Human-Aligned AI: Collective Intelligence and the Future of Work

people.tiZh: 英特尔 CEO
people.bioEn: CEO of Intel and veteran semiconductor investor; long-time Cadence CEO and founder of Walden International, now steering the Intel turnaround in the AI era.
people.bioZh: 英特尔 CEO、资深半导体投资人；曾长期执掌 Cadence 并创办华登国际，如今在 AI 时代主导英特尔的转型。

episodes.tEn: Lip-Bu Tan on Saving Intel: Culture, Customers, and the CPU Comeback
episodes.podEn: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

episodes.tEn: From Cadence to Intel: A CEO's Playbook for Turnaround
Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan on Culture and Engineering Transformation

views.en: AI is primary growth driver; Intel must rebuild trust via customer delight and engineering culture.
views.zh: 2025年，AI是半导体主要增长动力；Intel必须通过客户满意和工程文化重建信任。

views.en: Agentic and physical AI are next waves; US needs domestic fabs; bad news must reach CEO fast.
views.zh: 2026年3月，智能体AI和物理AI是下一波浪潮；美国需要本土晶圆厂；坏消息必须快速传达CEO。

views.en: CPU regains importance for AI inference; US government as Intel shareholder is necessary like TSMC.
views.zh: 2026年6月，CPU在AI推理中重新重要；美国政府作为Intel股东是必要的，类似台积电。

people.tiZh: ElevenLabs 网站/产品设计师
people.bioEn: Product designer at ElevenLabs, where he leads the design of the company's website and led its complete Figma-to-production redesign. Based in Berlin, he also builds indie tools for creatives (Portal, Droppable, App Stacks).
people.bioZh: ElevenLabs 的产品设计师,主导公司官网的设计,并完成了从 Figma 到上线的整体改版。他常驻柏林,同时独立开发面向创作者的工具(Portal、Droppable、App Stacks)。

episodes.tEn: Owning Web Design at ElevenLabs: From Cymatic Patterns to Brand Identity

people.tiEn: Founder & CEO, Hivemind; ex-New Computer, ex-Apple
people.tiZh: Hivemind 创始人兼 CEO,New Computer 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Jason Yuan is a designer known for AI-native interface design. He is the founder and CEO of Hivemind, a "social intelligence" company; previously he co-founded New Computer and led the design of Dot, a personal AI companion with long-term memory, and earlier designed intelligent interfaces on Apple's Human Interface team.
people.bioZh: Jason Yuan 是以 AI 原生界面设计著称的设计师,现为「社会智能」公司 Hivemind 的创始人兼 CEO。他此前联合创办 New Computer,主导设计具备长期记忆的个人 AI 伴侣 Dot,更早在苹果 Human Interface 团队设计智能操作系统界面。

episodes.tEn: From Dot to Hivemind: A Creative Journey in AI Design

people.tiZh: tldraw 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Steve Ruiz is the founder and CEO of tldraw, the London-based startup behind a widely used infinite-canvas SDK for the web that powers products at Shopify, Google, Autodesk and many AI apps. A former fine artist turned design engineer, he created the viral "Make Real" demo that turns hand-drawn sketches into working code.
people.bioZh: Steve Ruiz 是 tldraw 的创始人兼 CEO,这家伦敦创业公司打造了被广泛使用的 Web 无限画布 SDK,支撑着 Shopify、Google、Autodesk 及大量 AI 应用。他从美术出身转做设计工程,打造了将手绘草图变成可运行代码的爆款 demo「Make Real」。

episodes.tEn: The Infinite Canvas: A Pivotal Interface for AI Collaboration

people.tiZh: Perplexity 设计副总裁
people.bioEn: Henry Modisett is the founding designer and VP of Design at Perplexity AI, leading product design, the creative studio, and design operations. A designer with a computer science background, he is known for designing in React rather than Figma, and previously held design roles at Quora and Google.
people.bioZh: Henry Modisett 是 Perplexity AI 的创始设计师兼设计副总裁,负责产品设计、创意工作室与设计运营。他拥有计算机科学背景,以直接用 React 而非 Figma 做设计著称,此前曾在 Quora 和 Google 担任设计职位。

episodes.tEn: From Tech Demo to Billion-Dollar Product: Perplexity's Design Journey

people.tiZh: Perplexity 产品设计师
people.bioEn: Escha Vera is a product designer at Perplexity who led the design of Comet, the company's AI browser, building its onboarding, generative invite system, and design system from scratch. She is also an AI artist who trains her own image models and does music and operations for the record label N°ALIAE; she previously designed at Descript, Daylight Computer, and Detour.
people.bioZh: Escha Vera 是 Perplexity 的产品设计师,主导了该公司 AI 浏览器 Comet 的设计,从零构建了其新手引导、生成式邀请系统和设计系统。她同时也是一名 AI 艺术家,会训练自己的图像模型,并为唱片厂牌 N°ALIAE 负责音乐与运营;此前她曾在 Descript、Daylight Computer 和 Detour 担任设计师。

episodes.tEn: Designing Perplexity's AI Browser Comet from Scratch

people.tiZh: Perplexity 产品设计负责人
people.bioEn: Gunnar Gray is a multidisciplinary product designer and Product Design Lead at Perplexity, where he has shaped the company's mobile app and Voice Mode / dynamic voice experiences. Based in Minneapolis, he was previously a founding designer at Artifact (the AI news app by Instagram co-founders Kevin Systrom and Mike Krieger, later acquired by Yahoo) and a principal designer at MetaLab.
people.bioZh: Gunnar Gray 是一位多领域产品设计师,现任 Perplexity 产品设计负责人,主导了该公司移动应用及 Voice Mode(动态语音交互)体验的设计。他现居明尼阿波利斯,此前曾是 Artifact(由 Instagram 联合创始人 Kevin Systrom 与 Mike Krieger 打造、后被 Yahoo 收购的 AI 新闻应用)的创始设计师,并曾在 MetaLab 担任首席设计师。

episodes.tEn: Thriving as a Generalist Designer in the Age of AI

people.tiZh: OpenAI 产品设计负责人
people.bioEn: Ian Silber is Head of Product Design at OpenAI, where he has led design for ChatGPT and related products since August 2023. He was previously Director of Product Design at Instagram, and worked at Global Illumination and Artifact.
people.bioZh: Ian Silber 自 2023 年 8 月起担任 OpenAI 产品设计负责人,主导 ChatGPT 及相关产品的设计。他此前曾任 Instagram 产品设计总监,并在 Global Illumination 与 Artifact 工作。

episodes.tEn: Designing with AI: Inside OpenAI's Product Design

people.tiEn: Head of Design, Claude Code & Cowork at Anthropic
people.tiZh: Anthropic Claude Code 与 Cowork 设计负责人
people.bioEn: Meaghan Choi is Head of Design for Claude Code and Cowork at Anthropic, where she leads the design of the company's developer and agentic AI products. A design and product leader with over a decade of experience, she previously worked at Meta and Cloudflare.
people.bioZh: Meaghan Choi 是 Anthropic 旗下 Claude Code 与 Cowork 的设计负责人,主导公司面向开发者及智能体 AI 产品的设计。她拥有十余年设计与产品经验,此前曾任职于 Meta 和 Cloudflare。

episodes.tEn: Designing Claude Code: A Designer's Journey at Anthropic

people.tiEn: Head of Product Design at Anthropic
people.tiZh: Anthropic 产品设计负责人
people.bioEn: Joel Lewenstein is Head of Product Design at Anthropic, where he leads design for Claude and the company's API products. He previously led design teams at Airtable, Quora, Hustle, and GoodGuide.
people.bioZh: Joel Lewenstein 是 Anthropic 的产品设计负责人,主导 Claude 及公司 API 产品的设计。此前他曾在 Airtable、Quora、Hustle 和 GoodGuide 带领设计团队。

episodes.tEn: Designing for AI's Present and Future

people.tiZh: Cursor（Anysphere）设计负责人
people.bioEn: Ryo Lu is Head of Design at Anysphere, the maker of the AI code editor Cursor, which he joined in early 2025. He was previously a founding designer and design lead at Notion, and earlier worked as a product designer at Stripe and Asana.
people.bioZh: Ryo Lu 是 AI 代码编辑器 Cursor 母公司 Anysphere 的设计负责人，于 2025 年初加入。他此前是 Notion 的创始设计师与设计主管，更早曾在 Stripe 和 Asana 担任产品设计师。

episodes.tEn: Cursor: AI-Powered Code Editor for Designers

people.tiEn: Founding Designer & Head of Design, Lovable
people.tiZh: Lovable 创始设计师兼设计负责人
people.bioEn: Nad Chishtie is the founding designer and head of design at Lovable, the AI app-building ("vibe-coding") startup, where he leads the design vision for a platform that lets anyone build apps by chatting with AI. A London-based design and product leader with roughly two decades of experience, he previously worked at companies including Element and Haiku.
people.bioZh: Nad Chishtie 是 AI 应用构建("vibe-coding")创业公司 Lovable 的创始设计师兼设计负责人,主导这一"用对话即可造应用"平台的设计方向。他常驻伦敦,是拥有约二十年经验的设计与产品负责人,此前曾在 Element、Haiku 等公司任职。

episodes.tEn: Designing at a Rocket Ship: The First Designer at Lovable

people.zh: 亚历杭德罗·马塔马拉·奥尔蒂斯
people.tiZh: Runway 联合创始人兼首席设计官
people.bioEn: Alejandro Matamala Ortiz is a Chilean designer and programmer who co-founded the generative-AI company Runway in 2018 with Cristóbal Valenzuela and Anastasis Germanidis, and serves as its Chief Design Officer. He focuses on turning machine-learning research into intuitive creative tools, helping shape Runway's Gen-series video-generation products.
people.bioZh: Alejandro Matamala Ortiz 是一位智利设计师兼程序员,2018 年与 Cristóbal Valenzuela、Anastasis Germanidis 共同创办生成式 AI 公司 Runway,并担任首席设计官。他专注于将机器学习研究转化为直观易用的创作工具,主导塑造了 Runway 的 Gen 系列视频生成产品。

episodes.tEn: Building AI Products: Carving vs. Building

people.tiEn: Product & Design Lead, Google AI Studio
people.tiZh: Google AI Studio 产品与设计负责人
people.bioEn: Ammaar Reshi is a design leader and AI creator who leads Product and Design for Google AI Studio (Gemini's developer platform) at Google DeepMind, having previously served as Head of Design at the AI voice company ElevenLabs. He is known for AI creative experiments, including "Alice and Sparkle," one of the first AI-generated children's books.
people.bioZh: Ammaar Reshi 是一位设计负责人与 AI 创作者,目前在 Google DeepMind 领导 Google AI Studio(Gemini 的开发者平台)的产品与设计工作,此前曾任 AI 语音公司 ElevenLabs 的设计负责人。他以 AI 创意实验闻名,包括最早的 AI 生成童书之一《Alice and Sparkle》。

episodes.tEn: Designing with AI: Capturing Magic Without Burdening Users

people.tiEn: Product Designer; former Head of Design at Luma AI
people.tiZh: 产品设计师;前 Luma AI 设计负责人
people.bioEn: Tuhin Kumar is a product designer who has led design at Apple, Airbnb, Facebook, and generative-AI video/3D company Luma AI, where he served as Head of Design. In early 2026 he announced he had left Luma AI and is taking a break before deciding on his next role.
people.bioZh: 图欣·库马尔是一位产品设计师,曾在 Apple、Airbnb、Facebook 以及生成式 AI 视频/3D 公司 Luma AI 主导设计工作,在 Luma AI 担任设计负责人。2026 年初他宣布已从 Luma AI 离职,正处于休整期,尚未确定下一份工作。

episodes.tEn: Designing for Generative AI: From 0 to 1 with Luma AI's Head of Design

people.tiZh: Granola 联合创始人兼设计师
people.bioEn: Sam Stephenson is a British product designer and the co-founder of Granola, an AI notepad for meetings that reached a reported $1.5B valuation in 2026. A designer-turned-founder based in London, he leads the product's design-first philosophy of building calm, everyday software for the AI era.
people.bioZh: Sam Stephenson 是一位英国产品设计师,也是 AI 会议笔记应用 Granola 的联合创始人;该产品在 2026 年据报道达到 15 亿美元估值。他是一位从设计师转型的创始人,常驻伦敦,主导产品「设计优先」的理念,为 AI 时代打造平静、日常可用的软件。

episodes.tEn: Inventing the Future of AI-Assisted Work

people.tiEn: Design Lead for Claude (Anthropic); now Head of Design at Cursor
people.tiZh: Anthropic Claude 设计负责人;现任 Cursor 设计负责人
people.bioEn: Jenny Wen led design for Claude at Anthropic, where she drove the Claude.ai redesign and Claude Cowork; previously she was Director of Design at Figma leading the FigJam and Slides teams, and earlier a designer at Dropbox, Square, and Shopify. In July 2026 she announced she was leaving Anthropic to become Head of Design at Cursor.
people.bioZh: Jenny Wen 曾在 Anthropic 领导 Claude 的设计工作,主导了 Claude.ai 改版与 Claude Cowork;此前她是 Figma 设计总监,带领 FigJam 与 Slides 团队,更早在 Dropbox、Square 和 Shopify 担任设计师。2026 年 7 月,她宣布离开 Anthropic,出任 Cursor 设计负责人。

episodes.tEn: AI and Design: Three Designer Archetypes for the AI Era
How AI is Reshaping the Design Process

views.en: Traditional design process is dead; designers must ship fast and build trust through speed.
views.zh: 2026年3月：传统设计流程已死，设计师必须快速交付并通过速度建立信任。

views.en: Design vision horizon shrinks from 2-5 years to 3-6 months, even for cutting-edge companies.
views.zh: 2026年3月至5月：设计愿景从2-5年缩短至3-6个月，即使是前沿公司也是如此。

views.en: Hire 'crack new grads' with blank slates over experienced seniors burdened by old processes.
views.zh: 2026年3月至5月：招聘不受旧流程束缚的“优秀新人”，而非经验丰富但受旧流程拖累的资深人士。

views.en: Designers' unique value is sitting with ambiguity and exercising judgment, not just human-centeredness.
views.zh: 2026年5月：设计师的独特价值在于忍受模糊性和运用判断力，而不仅仅是“以人为中心”。

views.en: AI improves taste and judgment, but humans still decide what matters; designers control AI adoption pace.
views.zh: 始终：AI能提升品味和判断力，但人类仍决定什么重要；设计师控制AI采用的节奏。

people.tiEn: Professor of Computer Science at Stanford University; Co-founder & Chief Scientist at Kumo.ai
people.tiZh: 斯坦福大学计算机科学教授;Kumo.ai 联合创始人兼首席科学家
people.bioEn: Jure Leskovec is a Slovenian-American computer scientist and professor of computer science at Stanford University, and co-founder and chief scientist of the graph machine-learning startup Kumo.ai. A pioneer of graph neural networks and relational deep learning, he previously served as chief scientist at Pinterest and leads work toward an AI Virtual Cell.
people.bioZh: 尤雷·莱斯科韦茨是斯洛文尼亚裔美国计算机科学家、斯坦福大学计算机科学教授,同时是图机器学习创业公司 Kumo.ai 的联合创始人兼首席科学家。他是图神经网络与关系型深度学习的先驱,曾任 Pinterest 首席科学家,目前主导「AI 虚拟细胞」相关研究。

episodes.tEn: Relational Foundation Model and AI Virtual Cell

people.tiEn: Associate Professor of Computer Science, Stanford University; Co-founder & CEO of Inception Labs
people.tiZh: 斯坦福大学计算机科学副教授;Inception Labs 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Stefano Ermon is an associate professor of computer science at Stanford University, where his research spans generative models, diffusion, and machine learning for sustainability. In 2024 he co-founded Inception Labs, where he serves as CEO building diffusion-based large language models such as Mercury.
people.bioZh: Stefano Ermon 是斯坦福大学计算机科学副教授,研究领域涵盖生成模型、扩散模型以及面向可持续发展的机器学习。他于 2024 年联合创办 Inception Labs 并担任 CEO,开发 Mercury 等基于扩散的大语言模型。

episodes.tEn: Diffusion LLMs: Faster, Cheaper, and Scaling Better Than Autoregressive Models

people.tiEn: LLM Research Engineer, author and educator
people.tiZh: 大语言模型研究工程师、作家与教育者
people.bioEn: Sebastian Raschka is a German-born LLM research engineer, educator and best-selling author of books including "Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)" and "Machine Learning with PyTorch and Scikit-Learn." A former staff/senior engineer at Lightning AI and statistics professor at the University of Wisconsin–Madison, he writes the widely read "Ahead of AI" newsletter and is highly active on X (@rasbt).
people.bioZh: Sebastian Raschka 是出生于德国的大语言模型研究工程师、教育者和畅销书作家,著有《Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)》《Machine Learning with PyTorch and Scikit-Learn》等书。他曾任 Lightning AI 高级 / 员工工程师及威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校统计学教授,撰写广受欢迎的「Ahead of AI」通讯,并在 X(@rasbt)上非常活跃。

episodes.tEn: LLMs in 2026: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Post-Training Focus

people.tiEn: Member of Technical Staff, Reflection AI
people.tiZh: Reflection AI 技术团队成员
people.bioEn: Aakanksha Chowdhery is a member of technical staff at Reflection AI working on agentic AI and reinforcement learning for autonomous coding, and an adjunct professor at Stanford. She previously led pre-training work at Google, serving as lead author of the 540B-parameter PaLM model and a lead contributor to Gemini pre-training.
people.bioZh: Aakanksha Chowdhery 是 Reflection AI 的技术团队成员,研究智能体 AI 与用于自主编程的强化学习,同时担任斯坦福大学兼职教授。她此前在谷歌主导预训练工作,是 540B 参数 PaLM 模型的第一作者,也是 Gemini 预训练的核心贡献者。

episodes.tEn: Rethinking Pre-training for Agentic AI

people.tiZh: Yutori 联合创始人兼联合 CEO
people.bioEn: Devi Parikh is co-founder and co-CEO of Yutori, a startup building AI web agents. She was previously a Senior Director in Generative AI at Meta (until March 2024) and an associate professor at Georgia Tech, and is known for pioneering Visual Question Answering (VQA).
people.bioZh: Devi Parikh 是 AI 网页智能体创业公司 Yutori 的联合创始人兼联合 CEO。她此前担任 Meta 生成式 AI 部门高级总监(至 2024 年 3 月),并曾任佐治亚理工学院副教授,以开创视觉问答(VQA)研究而知名。

episodes.tEn: The Future of Web Interaction: AI Agents and Browser Automation

people.tiZh: Flexion Robotics 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Nikita Rudin is the co-founder and CEO of Flexion Robotics, a Zurich-based startup building the general-purpose intelligence stack ("brain") for humanoid robots. He earned a PhD in deep reinforcement learning for robotics at ETH Zurich's Robotic Systems Lab—where he created the widely used legged_gym and rsl_rl frameworks and trained the ANYmal quadruped via massively parallel RL—and previously worked as a research scientist at NVIDIA on Isaac Gym and Isaac Lab.
people.bioZh: Nikita Rudin 是 Flexion Robotics 的联合创始人兼 CEO,该公司位于苏黎世,致力于为人形机器人打造通用的智能栈(即机器人的「大脑」)。他在苏黎世联邦理工学院(ETH Zurich)机器人系统实验室获得机器人深度强化学习博士学位,期间开发了被广泛使用的 legged_gym 和 rsl_rl 框架,并用大规模并行强化学习训练四足机器人 ANYmal;此前他曾在 NVIDIA 担任研究科学家,参与 Isaac Gym 与 Isaac Lab 的研发。

episodes.tEn: The Gap Between Robotics Demos and Real-World Value

people.tiEn: Professor of Computer Science, UC Berkeley; Co-founder & CTO, Scaled Cognition
people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校计算机科学教授;Scaled Cognition 联合创始人兼 CTO
people.bioEn: Dan Klein is a professor of computer science at UC Berkeley, where he leads the Berkeley NLP Group within the BAIR lab, and has been a leading natural language processing researcher for two decades. He co-founded Scaled Cognition, serving as CTO, to build reliable agentic AI models.
people.bioZh: Dan Klein 是加州大学伯克利分校计算机科学教授,在 BAIR 实验室领导 Berkeley NLP Group,二十年来一直是自然语言处理领域的领军研究者。他联合创办了 Scaled Cognition 并担任 CTO,致力于打造可靠的智能体 AI 模型。

episodes.tEn: Designed to Sound Right, Not to Know What's Right
episodes.podEn: The AI Why with Liam Lawson

episodes.tEn: AI's Plausibility Problem: From Exponential Hype to Diminishing Returns

views.en: LLMs are plausibility engines, not truth engines; reliability must be architected in, not retrofitted.
views.zh: 2026年6月：LLM是合理性引擎而非真理引擎；可靠性必须内建于架构中，而非事后补救。

views.en: Scaling laws face diminishing returns; new techniques like reasoning and search are needed for progress.
views.zh: 2026年6月至7月：缩放定律面临收益递减；需要推理和搜索等新技术来推动进步。

views.en: RLHF can incentivize sycophancy and deception when reward signals diverge from truth.
views.zh: 2026年7月：当奖励信号偏离真相时，RLHF可能助长谄媚和欺骗。

views.en: LLMs lack metacognition; they cannot know what they don't know, eroding trust.
views.zh: 2026年7月：LLM缺乏元认知，无法知道自己不知道什么，这侵蚀了信任。

views.en: Specialist models with built-in reliability may outperform generalist models for enterprise tasks.
views.zh: 2026年7月：内建可靠性的专用模型可能在企业任务中超越通用模型。

people.tiZh: Edison Scientific(及 FutureHouse)联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Samuel G. Rodriques is a physicist and bioengineer who earned his PhD in physics from MIT and co-founded the San Francisco research lab FutureHouse in 2023 to build an "AI Scientist" for accelerating biomedical discovery. He is co-founder and CEO of Edison Scientific, the for-profit spinout behind the Kosmos AI scientist, and was named to the 2025 TIME100 AI.
people.bioZh: Samuel G. Rodriques 是一位物理学家兼生物工程师,在 MIT 取得物理学博士学位,并于 2023 年联合创办旧金山研究实验室 FutureHouse,致力于打造能加速生物医学发现的「AI 科学家」。他是从中拆分出的营利性公司 Edison Scientific 的联合创始人兼 CEO,该公司推出了 AI 科学家 Kosmos,他本人入选 2025 年 TIME100 AI 榜单。

episodes.tEn: AI Scientist: The Future of Drug Discovery

people.tiEn: Founder & CEO, Axiom (AI for formal mathematical reasoning)
people.tiZh: Axiom 创始人兼 CEO（面向形式化数学推理的 AI）
people.bioEn: Carina Letong Hong is the founder and CEO of Axiom, an AI startup building an "AI mathematician" that generates and formally verifies mathematical proofs. A former Stanford mathematics PhD student and Rhodes Scholar with a math-olympiad and MIT background, she raised $64M in seed funding (2025) and later a ~$200M round valuing Axiom at about $1.6B.
people.bioZh: 洪乐潼是 AI 创业公司 Axiom 的创始人兼 CEO,该公司致力于打造能生成并形式化验证数学证明的「AI 数学家」。她拥有数学奥赛与 MIT 背景,曾是斯坦福数学博士生和罗德学者;公司先后完成 6400 万美元种子轮融资(2025 年)及约 2 亿美元后续融资,估值约 16 亿美元。

episodes.tEn: Verified AI: Scaling Brilliance Through Formal Verification
Axiom Math: Building a Self-Improving Reasoning Engine with AI Mathematician

views.en: Scaling informal models to math AI is not viable; formal verification is essential for sound proofs.
views.zh: 2026年2月，认为将非正式模型扩展到数学AI不可行，形式化验证对可靠证明至关重要。

views.en: Auto-formalization is harder than proving; correctly formalizing statements without solutions is challenging.
views.zh: 2026年2月，指出自动形式化比证明更难；在没有解的情况下正确形式化陈述具有挑战性。

views.en: Formal verification scales brilliance, yielding performance gains and sample efficiency over informal methods.
views.zh: 2026年6月，强调形式化验证能扩展智慧，相比非正式方法带来性能提升和样本效率。

views.en: Informal math systems alone cannot scale to superintelligence; formal methods are necessary.
views.zh: 2026年6月，认为仅靠非正式数学系统无法扩展到超级智能；形式化方法是必需的。

views.en: Combining informal reasoning with formal verification is key for reliable AI in math and code.
views.zh: 始终主张将非正式推理与形式化验证相结合，是数学和代码领域可靠AI的关键。

people.tiEn: Head of Product, Platform (API) at OpenAI
people.tiZh: OpenAI 平台(API)产品负责人
people.bioEn: Olivier Godement is Head of Product for OpenAI's developer platform (API), which he has led since May 2023, overseeing products such as the Responses API and Agents SDK. A French product leader, he previously spent over eight years at Stripe and studied at Sciences Po and ESSEC.
people.bioZh: Olivier Godement 自 2023 年 5 月起担任 OpenAI 开发者平台(API)产品负责人,主导 Responses API、Agents SDK 等面向开发者的产品。他是法国籍产品负责人,加入 OpenAI 前曾在 Stripe 工作 8 年以上,毕业于巴黎政治学院与 ESSEC 商学院。

episodes.tEn: 2025: The Year of Enterprise Coding

people.tiEn: Head of Research Product Management, Anthropic
people.tiZh: Anthropic 研究产品管理负责人
people.bioEn: Dianne Na Penn is Head of Research Product Management at Anthropic, where she joined as the company's first technical product manager and leads bringing Claude models and Anthropic's research to users and developers across launches such as Sonnet 4.5, Haiku 4.5, and Opus 4.5. She previously led product for natural-language modeling at Amazon's Alexa AI.
people.bioZh: Dianne Na Penn 是 Anthropic 的研究产品管理负责人,作为公司第一位技术产品经理加入,主导将 Claude 模型与 Anthropic 的研究成果带给用户和开发者,并参与了 Sonnet 4.5、Haiku 4.5、Opus 4.5 等模型的发布。此前她在亚马逊 Alexa AI 负责自然语言建模的产品工作。

episodes.tEn: Opus 4.5: Deep Dive into Anthropic's Research and Product Strategy

people.tiEn: AI researcher; former head of OpenAI's Sora, co-inventor of Diffusion Transformers (DiT)
people.tiZh: AI 研究员;OpenAI Sora 前负责人,扩散 Transformer(DiT)共同发明者
people.bioEn: Bill (William) Peebles led OpenAI's Sora video-generation team, which he built from research to product before departing OpenAI in April 2026 as the Sora app was wound down. He earned his PhD at UC Berkeley (advised by Alexei Efros) and co-invented the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) with Saining Xie, the architecture underpinning modern text-to-video models.
people.bioZh: Bill(William)Peebles 曾领导 OpenAI 的 Sora 视频生成团队,将其从研究推进到产品,并在 2026 年 4 月 Sora 应用被关停之际离开 OpenAI。他在加州大学伯克利分校获得博士学位(导师为 Alexei Efros),并与谢赛宁(Saining Xie)共同发明了扩散 Transformer(DiT)——支撑现代文本生成视频模型的核心架构。

episodes.tEn: Sora: The AI Video Revolution and Social Experience

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CEO of Sierra; Chairman of the Board, OpenAI
people.tiZh: Sierra 联合创始人兼 CEO；OpenAI 董事会主席
people.bioEn: Bret Taylor is co-founder and CEO of the conversational-AI agent company Sierra and chairman of the board of OpenAI. He previously served as co-CEO of Salesforce and CTO of Facebook, and earlier led the team that co-created Google Maps.
people.bioZh: Bret Taylor 是对话式 AI 智能体公司 Sierra 的联合创始人兼 CEO，同时担任 OpenAI 董事会主席。他此前曾任 Salesforce 联席 CEO 和 Facebook 首席技术官,更早时还领导团队共同创造了 Google 地图。

episodes.tEn: AI Agents: The New Internet Wave

people.tiEn: Head of Engineering, OpenAI API Platform
people.tiZh: OpenAI API 平台工程负责人
people.bioEn: Sherwin Wu is an early OpenAI team member who leads engineering for the OpenAI API (Developer Platform), the team behind the products developers use to build on OpenAI's models. Before OpenAI he spent 5+ years on Opendoor's pricing team and earlier worked at Quora, after earning a computer science degree from MIT.
people.bioZh: 吴谢文是 OpenAI 的早期成员,负责 OpenAI API(开发者平台)的工程团队,该团队打造了供开发者基于 OpenAI 模型进行构建的产品。加入 OpenAI 之前,他在 Opendoor 的定价团队工作了 5 年多,更早曾任职于 Quora,拥有麻省理工学院(MIT)计算机科学学位。

episodes.tEn: 95% of OpenAI engineers use Codex, 100% PRs reviewed by AI

people.tiZh: Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)联合创始人兼普通合伙人
people.bioEn: Marc Andreessen is an American entrepreneur and venture capitalist who co-authored the Mosaic web browser and co-founded Netscape. He is co-founder and general partner of the Silicon Valley venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), which he started with Ben Horowitz in 2009.
people.bioZh: 马克·安德森是美国企业家与风险投资人,曾参与开发 Mosaic 浏览器并联合创办网景(Netscape)公司。他是硅谷风险投资机构 Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)的联合创始人兼普通合伙人,该公司由他与本·霍洛维茨于 2009 年共同创立。

episodes.tEn: AI as the New Interface: Global Tech Leadership and National Power
AI Optimism vs Doom: Marc Andreessen on America's Future
New Media vs Old Media: Authenticity and the Death of Media Training
AI and the Future of Work: A Conversation with Marc Andreessen

views.en: AI is a philosopher's stone turning sand into thought; AGI is not singular, human-level is a footnote.
views.zh: AI是点沙成思的哲人石；AGI并非单一事件，人类水平只是注脚。

views.en: New media requires authenticity; founders must tell their own story directly, bypassing old media.
views.zh: 新媒体要求真实；创始人必须直接讲述自己的故事，绕过旧媒体。

views.en: AI is the world's best teacher; self-driving cars work; robotics and AI medicine face regulatory cartels.
views.zh: AI是世界上最好的老师；自动驾驶已成熟；机器人和AI医疗面临监管卡特尔。

views.en: AI models embed cultural values, making them geopolitical tools; open-source poses security trade-offs.
views.zh: AI模型嵌入文化价值观，成为地缘政治工具；开源带来安全权衡。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 增长负责人
people.bioEn: Amol Avasare is Head of Growth at Anthropic, the AI company behind Claude, which he joined by cold-emailing the leadership before any growth role existed; on his watch the product scaled from roughly $1B to over $19B in ARR. He previously led growth product teams at Mercury and MasterClass and was a startup founder before that.
people.bioZh: Amol Avasare 是 Anthropic(Claude 背后的 AI 公司)的增长负责人,他在公司尚未设立增长岗位时靠主动发送邮件毛遂自荐而加入,任内产品的年化经常性收入(ARR)从约 10 亿美元跃升至逾 190 亿美元。此前他曾在 Mercury 和 MasterClass 带领增长产品团队,更早还是一名创业公司创始人。

episodes.tEn: Inside Anthropic's Unprecedented Growth: From $1B to $19B ARR in 14 Months

people.tiZh: Applied Intuition 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Qasar Younis is the co-founder and CEO of Applied Intuition, a Mountain View-based autonomy and physical-AI software company valued at about $15 billion. Born on a farm in Pakistan, he previously started his career as an engineer at General Motors and Bosch, co-founded Talkbin (acquired by Google), and served as COO of Y Combinator from 2015 to 2017.
people.bioZh: 卡萨尔·尤尼斯是 Applied Intuition 的联合创始人兼 CEO,这家位于山景城的自动驾驶与物理 AI 软件公司估值约为 150 亿美元。他出生于巴基斯坦的一个农场,职业生涯始于通用汽车和博世的工程师岗位,后联合创办了 Talkbin(被谷歌收购),并于 2015 至 2017 年间担任 Y Combinator 的首席运营官。

episodes.tEn: Autonomous Vehicles: From Tesla to Waymo and Beyond
The AI CEO Nobody Knows: Building the Future of Physical AI

views.en: Physical AI will transform farming, mining, construction in 5-10 years, addressing labor shortages and safety.
views.zh: 物理AI将在5-10年内变革农业、采矿和建筑，解决劳动力短缺和安全问题。

views.en: Autonomous vehicles are already safer than human drivers; core value is reducing injuries and deaths.
views.zh: 自动驾驶已比人类驾驶员更安全；核心价值是减少伤亡。

views.en: Chinese AI companies are not comparable to American ones; they are extensions of the state.
views.zh: 中国AI公司与美国不可比；它们是国家的延伸。

views.en: Horizontal platform approach is better than vertical integration for self-driving technology.
views.zh: 对于自动驾驶技术，横向平台方法优于垂直整合。

views.en: Founders should focus on product and customers, not public promotion; best work is done alone.
views.zh: 创始人应专注于产品和客户，而非公开宣传；最佳工作独自完成。

people.tiEn: Independent software developer and AI blogger (simonwillison.net); creator of Datasette and the LLM CLI
people.tiZh: 独立软件开发者与 AI 博主(simonwillison.net);Datasette 与 LLM 命令行工具的作者
people.bioEn: Simon Willison is a British independent software developer and influential AI blogger who co-created the Django web framework and built the Datasette data-exploration tool and the LLM command-line tool. He coined the term "prompt injection" in 2022 and, more recently, "lethal trifecta" (2025) and "agentic engineering" (2026); he has served on the Python Software Foundation board since 2022.
people.bioZh: Simon Willison 是一位英国独立软件开发者与颇具影响力的 AI 博主,他是 Django Web 框架的共同作者,并开发了 Datasette 数据探索工具与 LLM 命令行工具。他在 2022 年提出了「提示词注入(prompt injection)」一词,近来又提出「致命三要素(lethal trifecta)」(2025)与「智能体工程(agentic engineering)」(2026);自 2022 年起担任 Python 软件基金会理事。

episodes.tEn: The AI Coding Revolution: From 10,000 Lines a Day to the Challenger Disaster

people.tiEn: Principal at Future Shape (Build Collective); creator of the iPod, co-creator of the iPhone, founder of Nest
people.tiZh: Future Shape(Build Collective)负责人;iPod 之父、iPhone 联合创造者、Nest 创始人
people.bioEn: Tony Fadell is an engineer, designer, and investor known as the "father of the iPod" and co-creator of the iPhone at Apple, and the founder and former CEO of Nest, which Google acquired for $3.2 billion in 2014. He is a former member of the General Magic team, principal at his investment and advisory firm Future Shape (Build Collective), and author of the New York Times bestseller "Build".
people.bioZh: 托尼·法德尔是一位工程师、设计师与投资人,被称为「iPod 之父」,在苹果参与联合创造了 iPhone,并创立 Nest 且曾任其 CEO;2014 年 Nest 被谷歌以 32 亿美元收购。他曾是 General Magic 团队成员,如今是投资与顾问机构 Future Shape(Build Collective)的负责人,也是《纽约时报》畅销书《Build》的作者。

episodes.tEn: Tony Fadell on Building the iPhone and the Importance of Storytelling
Tony Fadell on AI Devices, Apple's Future, and OpenAI's Strategy
36 Questions of Love: Childhood Moves and Parenting
Tony Fadell: The Magic of Early Programming and Creating Tools
From Reluctance to Book: Tony's Journey to Write 'Build'
Tony Fadell on Quitting Caffeine and Alcohol
Tony Fadell: From Childhood Tinkering to Creating the iPod

views.en: Technology should be introduced gradually; self-driving cars will dominate due to insurance costs.
views.zh: 技术应渐进引入；自动驾驶汽车因保险成本将主导市场。

views.en: Boredom between career chapters sparks clarity; consumer-compostable bioplastics are the only sustainable packaging.
views.zh: 职业间隙的空白带来清晰；消费后可堆肥生物塑料是唯一可持续包装。

views.en: Start with a press release; small teams thrive on self-management; hydrogen and biomass are underinvested.
views.zh: 从新闻稿开始；小团队靠自我管理；氢能和生物质能投资不足。

views.en: AI needs context from sensors; LLMs hallucinate; smart home still 5-6 years away; OpenAI's per-user economics worsen.
views.zh: AI需要传感器上下文；LLM会幻觉；智能家居还需5-6年；OpenAI单用户经济恶化。

views.en: Great products start from customer pain, deliver emotional superpower, and require opinion-based decisions for v1.
views.zh: 伟大产品始于用户痛点，提供情感超能力，v1需要基于意见的决策。

people.tiEn: Founder & CEO of ChatPRD; host of the "How I AI" podcast
people.tiZh: ChatPRD 创始人兼 CEO;「How I AI」播客主持人
people.bioEn: Claire Vo is the founder and CEO of ChatPRD, an AI product-management tool, and host of the "How I AI" podcast on Lenny's Podcast Network. A three-time chief product/technology officer (LaunchDarkly, Color Health, Optimizely) and repeat founder and engineer, she is known for running ChatPRD as an AI-native company operated with a fleet of AI agents.
people.bioZh: Claire Vo 是 AI 产品管理工具 ChatPRD 的创始人兼 CEO,也是 Lenny 播客网络旗下「How I AI」播客的主持人。她曾三度担任首席产品/技术官(LaunchDarkly、Color Health、Optimizely),是连续创业者兼工程师,以用一支 AI 智能体「团队」把 ChatPRD 打造成 AI 原生公司而广为人知。

episodes.tEn: From Skeptic to Power User: Claire Vo on OpenClaw

people.tiEn: Independent technology analyst; former partner at Andreessen Horowitz (a16z)
people.tiZh: 独立科技分析师;前 Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)合伙人
people.bioEn: Benedict Evans is a British independent technology analyst and former partner at Andreessen Horowitz, known for his weekly newsletter (175,000+ subscribers) and his widely followed annual presentations on tech and AI trends. Before going independent, he spent years as a16z's in-house analyst tracking major platform shifts across mobile, media and technology.
people.bioZh: Benedict Evans 是英国独立科技分析师,曾任 Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)合伙人,以其拥有 17.5 万 + 订阅者的每周简报,以及广受关注的年度科技与 AI 趋势演示而闻名。转为独立分析师之前,他在 a16z 担任内部分析师多年,长期追踪移动、媒体与科技领域的重大平台变革。

episodes.tEn: AI Models Commoditization and Public Market Test
Agentic Coding: From Useful to Game-Changing
AI Is as Big as the Internet or Mobile

views.en: AI is as big as the internet or mobile, but enterprise adoption takes years; distribution and application layer capture most value.
views.zh: 2026年5月：AI与互联网或移动同等重要，但企业采用需要数年；分发和应用层捕获大部分价值。

views.en: Agentic coding is first clear product-market fit; models commoditize; value moves up stack to applications, not model providers.
views.zh: 2026年6月8日：智能体编码是首个明确的产品市场契合点；模型商品化；价值上移至应用层，而非模型提供商。

views.en: Models commoditize with no network effects; chatbot UX poor; coding only clear fit; value in non-average, creative work.
views.zh: 2026年6月24日：模型商品化且无网络效应；聊天机器人体验差；编程是唯一明确契合点；价值在于非平均、创造性工作。

people.tiZh: Every 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Dan Shipper is the co-founder and CEO of Every, an applied AI lab and media company that publishes a daily AI newsletter and ships AI software products. He writes the weekly column Chain of Thought and hosts the AI & I podcast about how people use AI, and previously co-founded Firefly, which he sold to Pegasystems in 2014.
people.bioZh: 丹·希珀是 Every 的联合创始人兼 CEO,这是一家「应用 AI 实验室」兼媒体公司,既发布每日 AI 通讯,也开发多款 AI 软件产品。他撰写每周专栏 Chain of Thought,主持探讨人们如何使用 AI 的播客 AI & I;此前曾联合创办 Firefly,并于 2014 年将其出售给 Pegasystems。

episodes.tEn: AI Job Apocalypse Is a Lie: Dan Shipper’s Bold Predictions for Work in 2025

people.tiZh: OpenAI 战略前瞻（Strategic Futures）负责人
people.bioEn: Dean Woodley Ball is an AI policy expert who joined OpenAI in July 2026 to lead its new Strategic Futures team shaping frontier AI policy, having previously served as senior policy advisor at the White House OSTP where he was primary author of America's AI Action Plan. He authors the Hyperdimensional Substack and was a senior fellow at the Foundation for American Innovation.
people.bioZh: Dean Woodley Ball 是 AI 政策专家，于 2026 年 7 月加入 OpenAI，领导新设的 Strategic Futures 团队以塑造前沿 AI 政策；此前他在白宫科技政策办公室（OSTP）任高级政策顾问，是美国《AI 行动计划》的主要执笔人。他运营 Hyperdimensional Substack，曾任美国创新基金会（FAI）高级研究员。

episodes.tEn: Dean Ball on Joining OpenAI, AI Policy, and Recursive Self-Improvement

people.tiZh: METR 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Beth Barnes is the founder and CEO of METR (Model Evaluation and Threat Research), a nonprofit that evaluates frontier AI models' capabilities on long-horizon agentic tasks; she previously worked on AI alignment at OpenAI and DeepMind and started the org as ARC Evals before it became independent. She was named to TIME's 100 Most Influential People in AI in 2024.
people.bioZh: Beth Barnes 是 METR(模型评估与威胁研究)的创始人兼 CEO,这家非营利机构专门评估前沿 AI 模型在长周期智能体任务上的能力;此前她曾在 OpenAI 和 DeepMind 从事 AI 对齐研究,并以 ARC Evals 的名义创立该机构,后其独立运营。她入选了 2024 年《时代》周刊「AI 领域百大影响力人物」。

episodes.tEn: Evaluating AI Capabilities and Risks: A Conversation with Beth and David

people.tiZh: Cosine(Genie)联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Alistair Pullen is the co-founder and CEO of Cosine, a London-based, Y Combinator-backed AI startup that built Genie, an autonomous software-engineering model that in 2024 set a then-record score on the SWE-bench benchmark. Cosine is now developing Lumen Sovereign, positioned as Britain's first fully sovereign frontier AI model for defense and regulated sectors.
people.bioZh: Alistair Pullen 是 Cosine 的联合创始人兼 CEO,这家总部位于伦敦、由 Y Combinator 支持的 AI 创业公司打造了自主软件工程模型 Genie,该模型于 2024 年在 SWE-bench 基准测试上创下当时的最高纪录。Cosine 目前正在研发 Lumen Sovereign,定位为面向国防与受监管行业的英国首个完全主权前沿 AI 模型。

episodes.tEn: Sovereign AI: Building the UK's First LLM on a Startup Budget

people.tiEn: Head of ChatGPT (VP of Product), OpenAI
people.tiZh: OpenAI ChatGPT 负责人(产品副总裁)
people.bioEn: Nick Turley is the Head of ChatGPT and VP of Product at OpenAI, where he joined in 2022 and helped ship and scale ChatGPT into one of the fastest-growing products in history, reaching roughly 800 million weekly users. He previously held product leadership roles at Instacart and Dropbox.
people.bioZh: Nick Turley 是 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT 负责人兼产品副总裁,2022 年加入公司,参与打造并规模化 ChatGPT,使其成为史上增长最快的产品之一,周活跃用户约 8 亿。他此前曾在 Instacart 和 Dropbox 担任产品管理负责人。

episodes.tEn: From Free Demo to Super Assistant: OpenAI's Journey

people.tiZh: Meta 创始人、董事长兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Mark Zuckerberg is the co-founder, chairman and CEO of Meta Platforms, which he launched as Facebook in 2004. With his wife Priscilla Chan he runs the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, whose Biohub aims to use AI to help cure, prevent or manage all disease by the end of the century.
people.bioZh: 马克·扎克伯格是 Meta Platforms 的联合创始人、董事长兼 CEO,该公司于 2004 年以 Facebook 之名创立。他与妻子 Priscilla Chan 共同运营 Chan Zuckerberg Initiative,旗下 Biohub 致力于用 AI 在本世纪末前治愈、预防或管理所有疾病。

episodes.tEn: Meta's AI Glasses: The Next Computing Platform
Accelerating Biology with AI: Mark Zuckerberg, Priscilla Chan, and Alex Reeves on Biohub
AI Coding Agents and Open Source Models: Mark's Vision
Mark Zuckerberg on Jiu-Jitsu, Coffee, and UFC
Mark Zuckerberg Interview at Acquired Live: A New Era Begins
Meta's AI Ambitions: Llama 3, Open Source, and the Future of Intelligence
Mark Zuckerberg on Jiu-Jitsu, Fear, and Learning

views.en: Open-source AI is safer due to more scrutiny; scaling LLMs alone may not yield AGI.
views.zh: 2023年：开源AI因更多审查而更安全；仅靠Scaling大语言模型可能无法实现AGI。

views.en: Coding training improves reasoning across domains; energy becomes key bottleneck for scaling.
views.zh: 2024年：编程训练提升跨领域推理能力；能源成为Scaling的关键瓶颈。

views.en: AI will give everyone superintelligence; open-source models crucial for standards and security.
views.zh: 2025年：AI将赋予每个人超级智能；开源模型对标准和安全至关重要。

views.en: AI transforms biology into engineering science; curing all diseases by century end is too conservative.
views.zh: 2026年：AI将生物学转变为工程科学；本世纪末治愈所有疾病的目标过于保守。

views.en: Glasses are next computing platform; distributed AI safer than a single superintelligence.
views.zh: 2026年：眼镜是下一个计算平台；分布式AI比单一超级智能更安全。

people.tiZh: 微软董事长兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Satya Nadella is the Chairman and CEO of Microsoft, having been CEO since 2014 and adding the chairman role in 2021. Under his leadership Microsoft pivoted to cloud computing and became a leading force in AI, notably through its partnership with OpenAI.
people.bioZh: 萨提亚·纳德拉是微软的董事长兼 CEO,自 2014 年出任 CEO,并于 2021 年兼任董事长。在他的带领下,微软转向云计算,并通过与 OpenAI 的合作成为 AI 领域的领军力量。

episodes.tEn: Satya Nadella: AI as the Hill-Climbing Machine
Satya Nadella on AI Ecosystem Strategy and Frontier Models

views.en: Private evals are the biggest IP, more valuable than models or data, for hill-climbing on frontier models.
views.zh: 私有评估是最重要的知识产权，比模型或数据更有价值，用于在前沿模型上爬山。

views.en: Consumption pricing will grow over per-user pricing; outcome-based pricing is initially loved but later avoided.
views.zh: 按用量计费将超过按用户计费；基于结果的定价最初受欢迎，但后来被回避。

views.en: Generalist roles will see maximum returns in the agentic world, not specialists.
views.zh: 在智能体世界中，通才角色将获得最大回报，而非专才。

views.en: AI is the future of the firm; every enterprise must build its own hill-climbing machine to compound token capital.
views.zh: AI是企业的未来；每个企业必须构建自己的爬山机器以复合代币资本。

views.en: The biggest risk is tacit knowledge leaking from enterprises via AI training; security and containment are critical.
views.zh: 最大风险是企业隐性知识通过AI训练泄露；安全与遏制至关重要。

people.tiZh: Cerebras Systems 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Andrew Feldman is the co-founder and CEO of Cerebras Systems, which builds wafer-scale processors for AI and went public on Nasdaq (CBRS) in May 2026 in the year's largest US tech IPO, valuing the company at roughly $63 billion. He previously co-founded SeaMicro, which was acquired by AMD in 2012.
people.bioZh: Andrew Feldman 是 Cerebras Systems 的联合创始人兼 CEO,该公司打造用于 AI 的晶圆级处理器,并于 2026 年 5 月在纳斯达克(CBRS)上市,成为当年美国最大的科技 IPO,公司估值约 630 亿美元。此前他曾联合创办 SeaMicro,该公司于 2012 年被 AMD 收购。

episodes.tEn: Cerebras CEO on Giant Wafers and AI Chips
Cerebras CEO on $95B IPO, Wafer-Scale Chips, and AI Hardware
Cerebras CEO on Fast AI Inference and the Future of Computing

views.en: Fast inference is critical for AI adoption; slow AI has zero market. Hardware must be radically different from GPUs.
views.zh: 快速推理对AI采用至关重要；慢速AI没有市场。硬件必须与GPU截然不同。

views.en: Frontier labs are critical for hardware alignment. Inference demand exploded in late 2024 as models became smart enough.
views.zh: 前沿实验室对硬件对齐至关重要。2024年底，模型足够智能，推理需求爆发。

views.en: Speed is critical for both answer and agentic inference. CUDA's importance is declining, especially in inference.
views.zh: 速度对答案推理和智能体推理都至关重要。CUDA的重要性正在下降，尤其是在推理方面。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CTO, Databricks; Associate Professor, UC Berkeley
people.tiZh: Databricks 联合创始人兼 CTO,加州大学伯克利分校副教授
people.bioEn: Romanian-Canadian computer scientist who started the Apache Spark project during his PhD at UC Berkeley and created MLflow; he is co-founder and CTO of Databricks and an associate professor of EECS at UC Berkeley. He received the 2026 ACM Prize in Computing for his foundational contributions to data and machine learning systems.
people.bioZh: 罗马尼亚裔加拿大计算机科学家,在加州大学伯克利分校读博期间发起了 Apache Spark 项目,并创造了 MLflow;他是 Databricks 的联合创始人兼 CTO,同时担任加州大学伯克利分校 EECS 副教授。因在数据与机器学习系统方面的奠基性贡献,他获得了 2026 年 ACM 计算奖。

episodes.tEn: Omnigents: The Meta Harness for AI Agents

people.tiZh: Glean 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Arvind Jain is the founder and CEO of Glean, an enterprise AI search and work-assistant company valued at around $7B. He previously co-founded data-security company Rubrik and spent over a decade at Google as a Distinguished Engineer working on Search, Maps, and YouTube.
people.bioZh: Arvind Jain 是企业 AI 搜索与工作助手公司 Glean 的创始人兼 CEO,该公司估值约 70 亿美元。他此前联合创立了数据安全公司 Rubrik,并曾在 Google 担任杰出工程师十余年,参与搜索、地图和 YouTube 等产品。

episodes.tEn: Glean CEO: Enterprises Fear Frontier AI Models Eating Their Lunch

people.tiZh: 英国 ARIA「Safeguarded AI」项目技术顾问
people.bioEn: David "davidad" Dalrymple is an AI safety researcher who launched and led ARIA's £59M Safeguarded AI programme, which pairs formal mathematical proofs with AI world-models to give quantitative safety guarantees; in 2026 he moved from Programme Director to Technical Advisor. Known for his "Open Agency Architecture" and provably-safe-AI agenda, he previously co-invented the cryptocurrency Filecoin and was a research fellow in technical AI safety at Oxford.
people.bioZh: David "davidad" Dalrymple 是一位 AI 安全研究者,创立并领导了英国 ARIA 耗资 5900 万英镑的「Safeguarded AI」项目,该项目试图将形式化数学证明与 AI 世界模型结合,为系统输出提供可量化的安全保证;2026 年他由项目主管转任技术顾问。他以「开放机构架构」(Open Agency Architecture)和可证明安全 AI 的研究路线著称,此前曾联合发明加密货币 Filecoin,并在牛津大学担任技术性 AI 安全研究员。

episodes.tEn: The Cognitive Revolution: Davidad on Provably Safe AI and the Future of Alignment

people.tiEn: Professor, The Jackson Laboratory; AI × immunology
people.tiZh: 杰克逊实验室教授;AI × 免疫学
people.bioEn: Immunologist and professor at The Jackson Laboratory, an early and vocal power user of AI for biomedical research — from Codex-built lab tools to AI-designed experiments.
people.bioZh: 杰克逊实验室免疫学教授,生物医学 AI 的早期重度用户——从用 Codex 搭实验室工具到 AI 设计实验。

episodes.tEn: From Medical School to AI: A Biologist's Journey

people.tiEn: Founder & CEO, Osmo; ex-Google Brain (digital olfaction)
people.tiZh: Osmo 创始人兼 CEO；前 Google Brain（数字嗅觉）
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of Osmo, teaching computers to smell — digitizing scent with machine learning. Previously led olfactory AI research at Google Brain.
people.bioZh: Osmo 创始人兼 CEO，教计算机「闻」气味——用机器学习数字化嗅觉。此前在 Google Brain 领导嗅觉 AI 研究。

episodes.tEn: Giving Computers a Sense of Smell

people.tiEn: CTO, Genesis Molecular AI; led Llama 2/3 pretraining at Meta
people.tiZh: Genesis Molecular AI CTO；曾负责 Meta Llama 2/3 预训练
people.bioEn: CTO of Genesis Molecular AI, applying frontier-scale ML to drug discovery. Previously at Meta, where he led pretraining for Llama 2 and Llama 3.
people.bioZh: Genesis Molecular AI CTO，把前沿规模的机器学习用于药物发现。此前在 Meta 负责 Llama 2 与 Llama 3 的预训练。

episodes.tEn: From GANs to Diffusion: AI's Evolution in Protein Modeling

people.tiZh: Surge AI 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of Surge AI, the data and RLHF vendor behind many frontier-lab training runs. Previously at Google, Facebook and Twitter working on ML and data quality.
people.bioZh: Surge AI 创始人兼 CEO——众多前沿实验室训练背后的数据与 RLHF 供应商。此前在 Google、Facebook、Twitter 从事机器学习与数据质量工作。

episodes.tEn: AI in Medicine: Magic, Judgment, and the Future
The Pitfalls of Bad Benchmarks in AI Models

views.en: Optimizing for bad benchmarks like Elo leads to models optimizing for clickbait, not real quality.
views.zh: 2025年指出，针对Elo等不良基准进行优化会导致模型追求点击诱饵而非真正质量。

views.en: AI in medicine must prioritize safety over accuracy; human judgment is critical due to hallucination.
views.zh: 2026年强调，医疗AI必须优先考虑安全性而非准确性；由于幻觉，人类判断至关重要。

views.en: Proper human evaluation with sophisticated, creative evaluators is the gold standard for measuring progress.
views.zh: 始终认为，由老练、有创造力的评估者进行恰当的人类评估是衡量进展的黄金标准。

views.en: Models can regress if labs optimize on wrong data without proper measurements; safety requires vigilance.
views.zh: 从2025年到2026年，持续警告若实验室在错误数据上优化且缺乏恰当衡量，模型可能退化；安全需要警惕。

views.en: Retrieval augmented generation grounds AI responses in sources, improving reliability in medicine.
views.zh: 2026年提出，检索增强生成将AI回答锚定于来源，提高了医疗领域的可靠性。

people.tiZh: Cognition(Devin)联合创始人兼 CPO；「context engineering」提出者
people.bioEn: Co-founder and chief product officer of Cognition, the company behind the AI software engineer Devin. Credited with coining the term 'context engineering'.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼首席产品官——AI 软件工程师 Devin 背后的公司。「context engineering」一词的提出者。

episodes.tEn: AI Testing: Beyond Computer Use to Autonomous Agents

people.tiZh: KAUST AI 负责人
people.bioEn: Pioneer of deep learning and co-inventor of the LSTM, the recurrent network behind years of sequence modeling. A provocative voice on AGI and credit for ideas.
people.bioZh: 深度学习先驱、LSTM 共同发明者——多年序列建模的基石。在 AGI 与思想溯源上观点犀利、长期发声。

episodes.tEn: AGI and Physical AI: A Conversation with AI Pioneer Jurgen Schmidhuber
The Most Influential Invention of the 20th Century and the AI Explosion

views.en: AI explosion is the 21st century's grand theme; LLMs index human knowledge but lack physical world understanding.
views.zh: 2025年：AI爆发是21世纪的主旋律；大语言模型索引人类知识，但缺乏对物理世界的理解。

views.en: Self-awareness can emerge from data compression in predictive world models; AI will be cheap and accessible.
views.zh: 2025年：自我意识可从预测世界模型的数据压缩中涌现；AI将变得廉价且普及。

views.en: AI existential threat is overblown; superintelligent AIs will likely protect humans out of curiosity.
views.zh: 2025→26年：AI存在威胁被夸大；超级智能AI可能出于好奇保护人类。

views.en: True AGI requires physical robots with human-level hardware; current LLMs are biased by human data.
views.zh: 2026年：真正的AGI需要具备人类级硬件的物理机器人；当前大语言模型受人类数据偏见限制。

views.en: AI safety concerns are overblown; alignment is naive; open-source will dominate closed-source models.
views.zh: 2026年：AI安全问题被夸大；对齐是幼稚的；开源将主导闭源模型。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机制可解释性负责人
people.bioEn: Leads mechanistic interpretability research at Google DeepMind — reverse-engineering what actually happens inside large models. Known for open-source interpretability tooling and prolific mentoring.
people.bioZh: 领导 Google DeepMind 的机制可解释性研究——逆向工程大模型内部到底发生了什么。以开源可解释性工具与大量培养新人著称。

episodes.tEn: Peering Inside the Black Box of AI

people.tiEn: Co-founder, Simile; creator of Generative Agents (Stanford)
people.tiZh: Simile 联合创始人；生成式智能体作者（斯坦福）
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Simile, building large-scale simulations of human behavior. As a Stanford PhD he created 'Generative Agents' — the influential Smallville simulation of AI agents that plan, remember, and socialize.
people.bioZh: Simile 联合创始人，构建大规模人类行为模拟。斯坦福博士期间创造了「生成式智能体」——那个会规划、记忆、社交的 Smallville AI 智能体模拟，影响深远。

episodes.tEn: AI Agents: The Next Frontier Beyond LLMs
Simulating Human Societies with AI: From Smallville to Real-World Applications

views.en: LLMs encode human behavior from data, enabling realistic simulations that predict actions 85% as accurately as humans.
views.zh: 2026年6月，认为大语言模型能从训练数据中编码人类行为，实现逼真的模拟，预测准确度达人类的85%。

views.en: Frontier models optimized for rationality are not best for simulating irrational human behavior.
views.zh: 2026年6月，反共识：为理性优化的前沿模型不适合模拟非理性人类行为。

views.en: AGI may be a distributed society of specialized agents, not a single superintelligent entity.
views.zh: 2026年6月，反共识：AGI可能是分布式专家智能体社会，而非单一超级智能实体。

views.en: Agents require defense in depth: environment, agent, model, and human controls for safety.
views.zh: 2026年6月，智能体安全需要纵深防御：环境、智能体、模型和人类控制多重缓解措施。

views.en: Future agentic economies will have specialists and generalists, with alignment via economic incentives.
views.zh: 2026年6月，未来智能体经济将包含专家和通才，通过经济激励实现对齐。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CEO, Liquid AI; liquid neural networks (ex-MIT)
people.tiZh: Liquid AI 联合创始人兼 CEO；液态神经网络（前 MIT）
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Liquid AI, commercializing liquid neural networks — compact, continuous-time models he pioneered at MIT. Argues efficient architectures, not scale alone, define frontier capability.
people.bioZh: Liquid AI 联合创始人兼 CEO，将他在 MIT 首创的「液态神经网络」——紧凑的连续时间模型——商业化。主张高效架构而非单纯规模，才定义前沿能力。

episodes.tEn: Liquid AI: Squeezing Maximum Intelligence from Limited Compute

people.tiZh: 3Blue1Brown 创作者；数学教育者
people.bioEn: Creator of 3Blue1Brown, the beloved YouTube channel that visualizes mathematics — from linear algebra to neural networks. A leading voice on how AI is accelerating mathematical discovery.
people.bioZh: 3Blue1Brown 创作者——那个用可视化讲数学（从线性代数到神经网络）的知名 YouTube 频道。关于 AI 如何加速数学发现的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: AI in Math: From IMO to Millennium Problems

people.tiEn: Lead, Google AI Studio & Gemini API; ex-OpenAI
people.tiZh: Google AI Studio 与 Gemini API 负责人；前 OpenAI
people.bioEn: Leads Google AI Studio and the Gemini API, shaping how developers build on frontier models. Previously led developer relations at OpenAI.
people.bioZh: 负责 Google AI Studio 与 Gemini API，塑造开发者在前沿模型上的构建方式。此前在 OpenAI 领导开发者关系。

episodes.tEn: Agentic AI Era: Google's Anti-Gravity Harness Powers Next-Gen Products

people.tiZh: MatX 联合创始人兼 CEO；前 Google（大模型推理）
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of MatX, building chips designed specifically for large language models. Previously at Google, where he worked on high-performance LLM training and serving.
people.bioZh: MatX 联合创始人兼 CEO，专为大语言模型打造芯片。此前在 Google 从事高性能大模型训练与推理。

episodes.tEn: How AI Chips Work: From Logic Gates to Matrix Multiplication
AI Inference Economics: Batch Size, Latency, and Cost

views.en: Inference cost dominated by memory bandwidth, not compute; batch size trades off latency vs cost.
views.zh: 2026年4月指出推理成本主要由内存带宽而非算力决定，批次大小是延迟与成本的权衡杠杆。

views.en: Models overtrained ~100x beyond Chinchilla-optimal due to inference cost; context length limited by memory wall.
views.zh: 2026年4月认为模型因推理成本过度训练约100倍于Chinchilla最优，上下文长度受限于内存墙。

views.en: Data movement dominates compute cost even inside chip; low precision yields quadratic efficiency gains.
views.zh: 2026年5月强调芯片内部数据搬运成本远超计算，低精度带来二次方效率提升。

views.en: GPUs are many tiny TPUs tiled; systolic arrays and scratchpad memory key for efficiency.
views.zh: 2026年5月认为GPU本质是多个小型TPU拼接，脉动阵列与暂存器内存是效率关键。

people.tiEn: VP of AI, 1X; ex-Google Brain (robotics, RL)
people.tiZh: 1X AI 副总裁；前 Google Brain（机器人、强化学习）
people.bioEn: VP of AI at 1X Technologies (humanoid robots). Previously a research scientist at Google Brain working on robotics, reinforcement learning, and generative models.
people.bioZh: 1X Technologies（人形机器人）AI 副总裁。此前在 Google Brain 任研究科学家，研究机器人、强化学习与生成模型。

episodes.tEn: Building AlphaGo from Scratch: Insights for AI Research

people.tiEn: Member of Technical Staff, xAI (Grok Imagine); ex-NVIDIA (Cosmos)
people.tiZh: xAI 技术成员（Grok Imagine）；前 NVIDIA（Cosmos 世界模型）
people.bioEn: Works on Grok Imagine at xAI, building video generation and world models. Previously at NVIDIA, where he helped build the Cosmos world foundation model.
people.bioZh: 在 xAI 负责 Grok Imagine，构建视频生成与世界模型。此前在 NVIDIA 参与打造 Cosmos 世界基础模型。

episodes.tEn: How to Stand Out in an AI-Driven Job Market
Visual Intelligence Comes from Language Models

views.en: Visual intelligence gains come mostly from language models, not video models. Video agents with language orchestrators are the next big trend.
views.zh: 视觉智能的提升主要来自语言模型而非视频模型。以语言模型作为编排器的视频智能体将是下一个大趋势。

views.en: AI is a general-purpose technology; experience and expertise are crucial for effective use. Human taste and voice become more valuable.
views.zh: AI是通用技术，经验和专业知识对有效使用至关重要。人类的品味和独特声音变得更加宝贵。

people.tiEn: Researcher, Google; PhD student, Cornell (continual learning)
people.tiZh: Google 研究员、康奈尔博士生（持续学习）
people.bioEn: Researcher at Google and PhD student at Cornell, working on continual learning and new sequence-model architectures (Nested Learning, Titans).
people.bioZh: Google 研究员、康奈尔大学博士生，研究持续学习与新型序列模型架构（Nested Learning、Titans）。

episodes.tEn: Nested Learning & AI Sleep: Towards Continual Learning with Ali Behrouz

people.tiZh: Sakana AI 创始研究员
people.bioEn: Founding researcher at Sakana AI, working at the intersection of large language models and evolutionary methods (e.g. Shinka Evolve).
people.bioZh: Sakana AI 创始研究员，专注大语言模型与进化方法的结合（如 Shinka Evolve）。

episodes.tEn: Evolutionary AI and Scientific Discovery with Robert Lange

people.tiZh: SemiAnalysis 创始人兼首席分析师
people.bioEn: Founder and chief analyst of SemiAnalysis, the closely-followed research firm covering semiconductors, AI compute, and datacenter economics. One of the most-cited independent voices on the hardware bottlenecks to scaling AI.
people.bioZh: SemiAnalysis 创始人兼首席分析师，该机构专注半导体、AI 算力与数据中心经济学。他是关于 AI 扩展硬件瓶颈最常被引用的独立声音之一。

episodes.tEn: From Forum Poster to AI Infrastructure Analyst: The Story of Semi Analysis
From Motel to Semi Analysis: Dylan Patel's Journey
Hyperscaler Capex and AI Lab Compute Scaling

views.en: Scaling bottleneck is semiconductor supply chain, not just compute; GPU depreciation cycles may lengthen due to inference demand.
views.zh: 2026年3月，认为规模扩张的瓶颈是半导体供应链而非单纯算力；GPU折旧周期可能因推理需求而延长。

views.en: Inference will surpass oil as largest market; hardware-software co-design yields multiplicative gains; CUDA moat weakening.
views.zh: 2026年6月，提出推理将成为最大市场，超过石油；软硬件协同设计带来倍增收益；CUDA护城河正在减弱。

views.en: AI models improve 60x/year in cost-efficiency; memory demand surges due to reasoning and agents; CPU demand inflecting.
views.zh: 2026年7月，指出AI模型每年成本效率提升60倍；推理和智能体推动内存需求激增；CPU需求出现拐点。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & Chief Scientist, EvolutionaryScale; creator of ESM
people.tiZh: EvolutionaryScale 联合创始人兼首席科学家；ESM 蛋白质模型作者
people.bioEn: Co-founder and chief scientist of EvolutionaryScale, building frontier protein language models (ESM/ESMFold). Previously led protein AI research at Meta FAIR.
people.bioZh: EvolutionaryScale 联合创始人兼首席科学家，构建前沿蛋白质语言模型（ESM/ESMFold）。此前在 Meta FAIR 领导蛋白质 AI 研究。

episodes.tEn: ESMC: World Modeling for Protein Design

people.tiEn: AI CTO, Linux Foundation; ED, PyTorch Foundation
people.tiZh: Linux 基金会 AI CTO；PyTorch 基金会执行董事
people.bioEn: AI CTO at the Linux Foundation and Executive Director of the PyTorch Foundation. A champion of open-source AI who works across frontier labs — recently touring DeepSeek, Moonshot, Zhipu, Qwen and MiniMax to see China's open-model ecosystem firsthand.
people.bioZh: Linux 基金会 AI CTO、PyTorch 基金会执行董事。开源 AI 的推动者，近期走访 DeepSeek、月之暗面、智谱、Qwen 与 MiniMax，一线观察中国开源模型生态。

episodes.tEn: AI CTO at Linux Foundation on Open Source AI, China's Rise, and Agentic AI

people.tiZh: Zynga 创始人
people.bioEn: Founder of Zynga, the company behind FarmVille and Words with Friends. A serial product founder known for the Proven-Better-New framework and sharp instincts about what makes products spread, now writing about play and product craft.
people.bioZh: Zynga 创始人——FarmVille、Words with Friends 背后的公司。连续产品创业者，以 Proven-Better-New 框架与对产品传播的敏锐直觉著称，近来书写游戏心态与产品之道。

episodes.tEn: Building Failure Machines: The Zynga Way
Building Products People Love: A Playbook for the AI Era
Mark Pincus on Proven Better New: A Framework for Successful Product Ideas

views.en: Consumer AI is uninvestable now yet opportunity is greatest; proven better new framework applies.
views.zh: 2026年6月，认为消费级AI虽不可投资但机会最大，沿用“已验证、更好、新”框架。

views.en: Consumer AI revolution likely in 2029; free unlimited compute will reshape services.
views.zh: 2026年6月，预测消费级AI革命可能在2029年，免费无限算力将重塑服务。

views.en: Enterprise and prosumer markets better than consumer apps; AI agents enable autonomous networking.
views.zh: 2026年7月，转向看好企业及专业消费者市场，AI智能体可自主联网。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 前沿评估负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the frontier evaluations team at OpenAI, building new ways to measure and forecast what models can do as they grow more capable. A researcher focused on rigorous evals.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 前沿评估团队负责人，为日益强大的模型设计新的能力测量与预测方法。专注严谨评测的研究者。

episodes.tEn: Building Crunchier Evals: Tejal Patwardhan on Measuring AI Progress

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of World Labs with Fei-Fei Li, building spatial intelligence and generative 3D world models. Earlier a computer-vision researcher known for teaching Stanford CS231n and work on style transfer.
people.bioZh: 与李飞飞联合创办 World Labs，研究空间智能与生成式 3D 世界模型。此前是计算机视觉研究者，以讲授斯坦福 CS231n 与风格迁移工作知名。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to World Models: The Scaling of Compute and Spatial Intelligence

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人
people.bioEn: Senior Director and Head of Robotics at Google DeepMind, leading robot-learning efforts including the Gemini Robotics models that bring foundation models into the physical world.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人（高级总监），领导机器人学习工作，包括把基础模型带入物理世界的 Gemini Robotics 模型。

episodes.tEn: From Reinforcement Learning to Gemini Robotics: The Evolution of Embodied AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Interpretability researcher at Anthropic known for work on the biology of large language models — reverse-engineering the features and circuits inside models to see how they actually compute.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员，以大语言模型的生物学研究知名——逆向拆解模型内部的特征与电路，看清它到底如何计算。

episodes.tEn: On the Biology of a Large Language Model

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁
people.bioEn: VP of Research at OpenAI, where he leads the reasoning effort behind o1, o3 and GPT-5 thinking. He focuses on making models reason reliably over long, hard problems.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁，主导 o1、o3 与 GPT-5 思考背后的推理研究。专注于让模型在漫长、困难的问题上可靠推理。

episodes.tEn: Scaling AI: Pre-training and RL
OpenAI's VP of Research on Reasoning, Chain of Thought, and the Future of AI

views.en: Pre-training + RL is the core formula; RLHF was crucial to unlock GPT-4's potential.
views.zh: 预训练加强化学习是核心公式；RLHF 对释放 GPT-4 潜力至关重要。

views.en: Scaling RL is harder than scaling pre-training due to more moving parts and failure modes.
views.zh: 扩展强化学习比扩展预训练更难，因为变量更多、失败模式更复杂。

views.en: Alignment is a never-ending pursuit because human notions of right and wrong evolve.
views.zh: 对齐是永无止境的追求，因为人类对是非的观念会不断演变。

views.en: Scaling RL alone may not lead to AGI; continual learning is a necessary missing piece.
views.zh: 仅靠扩展强化学习可能无法实现 AGI；持续学习是缺失的关键要素。

views.en: Biggest societal risk from AI is not extinction but a dystopian retreat into virtual worlds.
views.zh: AI 最大的社会风险不是灭绝，而是反乌托邦式地退入虚拟世界。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Mechanistic interpretability researcher at Anthropic, working on superposition, dictionary learning and circuit tracing to understand what actually happens inside large models.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 机制可解释性研究员，研究叠加、字典学习与电路追踪，试图搞清大模型内部到底发生了什么。

episodes.tEn: RL for Language Models Finally Works: Expert Performance in Math and Code

people.tiEn: VP of Research (AI for Science), Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁（AI 科学）
people.bioEn: VP of Research at Google DeepMind, where he leads AI for Science. His teams apply AI to protein folding, mathematics, materials and other scientific frontiers.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁，主管 AI for Science。其团队把 AI 用于蛋白质折叠、数学、材料等科学前沿。

episodes.tEn: AlphaGo: The Match That Changed AI Forever
AlphaFold 3: Unlocking the Structures of Life's Molecules

views.en: AI in science should tackle root-node problems for broad impact, not narrow applications.
views.zh: 2024年强调AI在科学中应解决根节点问题以产生广泛影响，而非狭窄应用。

views.en: Post-training with reinforcement learning is key to pushing AI beyond human knowledge.
views.zh: 从2024到2026年，后训练结合强化学习成为推动AI超越人类知识的关键。

views.en: Large language models are a shortcut to intelligence but struggle to go beyond human data.
views.zh: 2026年指出大语言模型是智能的捷径，但难以超越人类数据。

views.en: Verifiable domains like code and games are crucial for AI to produce novel insights.
views.zh: 始终认为代码和游戏等可验证领域对AI产生新颖见解至关重要。

views.en: Interpretability is not essential for scientific breakthroughs like AlphaFold.
views.zh: 始终认为可解释性对AlphaFold等科学突破并非必需。

people.tiZh: AI 研究员（前 OpenAI）
people.bioEn: AI researcher known as a co-creator of chain-of-thought prompting, and for work on o1 and Deep Research. A prominent voice on reasoning and emergent abilities in large models.
people.bioZh: AI 研究员，思维链提示的共同提出者之一，参与 o1 与 Deep Research。是大模型推理与涌现能力方面的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Intelligence as a Commodity: Three Key Trends for AI in 2025

people.tiZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CTO of Reflection AI and a co-creator of AlphaGo and AlphaZero at DeepMind. A reinforcement-learning researcher turned frontier-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO，DeepMind 时期是 AlphaGo 与 AlphaZero 的共同创造者。从强化学习研究者转向前沿智能体的构建者。

episodes.tEn: From AlphaGo to AI Agents: Giannis on Breakthroughs in Reinforcement Learning

people.tiEn: Head of AGI Safety & Alignment, Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind AGI 安全与对齐负责人
people.bioEn: Head of AGI Safety and Alignment at Google DeepMind. A leading voice on interpretability, oversight and how to make advanced AI systems safe from the inside.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind AGI 安全与对齐负责人。在可解释性、监督以及如何从内部让先进 AI 系统更安全方面是重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Alignment Might Not Be Catastrophic: Rohan Sha's Optimistic Take

people.tiZh: Wayve 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Wayve and a PhD roboticist who pioneered end-to-end learned autonomous driving and generative driving world models. A champion of embodied AI.
people.bioZh: Wayve 联合创始人兼 CEO，机器人学博士，开创了端到端学习的自动驾驶与生成式驾驶世界模型。倡导具身智能。

episodes.tEn: From Farm to Frontier: Alex Kendall on Wayve's End-to-End AI for Autonomous Driving
From AV 1.0 to 2.0: The Rise of End-to-End Neural Networks in Autonomous Driving

views.en: End-to-end deep learning outperforms hand-coded stacks; world models enable reasoning and emergent safe behaviors.
views.zh: 2025年11月：端到端深度学习优于手工编码栈；世界模型实现推理和涌现的安全行为。

views.en: Autonomous driving is an AI problem solved by end-to-end learning; scaling data and compute is key.
views.zh: 2026年4月：自动驾驶是AI问题，端到端学习解决；扩展数据和算力是关键。

views.en: End-to-end neural networks are interpretable and superior to hybrid rule-based systems.
views.zh: 始终：端到端神经网络可解释且优于混合规则系统。

views.en: Language integration improves representation and reasoning; consumer vehicles will outscale robotaxis.
views.zh: 2025年11月至2026年4月：语言集成改善表征和推理；消费级车辆将超越Robotaxi规模。

views.en: Safety is paramount; minimal risk maneuvers provide a third option beyond trolley problem.
views.zh: 始终：安全至上；最小风险操作提供电车难题之外的第三种选择。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at Google DeepMind and lead author of the Dreamer series of world models, which learn to imagine and plan. A central figure in world-model research.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家，Dreamer 系列世界模型的主要作者——让智能体学会想象与规划。是世界模型研究的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Pathways to AGI: Architecture, Compute, and Beyond LLMs

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at OpenAI who built Deep Research and helped build ChatGPT Agent, training agents end-to-end with reinforcement learning. A leading agents researcher.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究科学家，打造了 Deep Research 并参与 ChatGPT Agent，用强化学习端到端训练智能体。是智能体研究的一线人物。

episodes.tEn: The Origin Story of OpenAI's Deep Research

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and lead author of the GPT-3 paper. He leads the compute and scaling effort that trains frontier models like Claude.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，GPT-3 论文的主要作者。主导训练 Claude 等前沿模型的算力与扩展工作。

episodes.tEn: From Awkward Kid to AI Co-Founder: Tom Brown's Journey

people.tiZh: Anthropic 哲学家
people.bioEn: Philosopher at Anthropic who shapes the character and values of Claude. She works at the intersection of philosophy and AI alignment, thinking about how models should behave, hold values, and treat the people they talk to.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 哲学家，负责塑造 Claude 的性格与价值观。工作处在哲学与 AI 对齐的交叉点，思考模型应如何行事、秉持价值观、以及如何对待与之交流的人。

episodes.tEn: A Philosopher at Anthropic: Shaping AI Character and Ethics

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Researcher on the OpenAI reasoning team. Known for leading work behind the model that reached IMO gold-medal level, and for using a general-purpose model to help disprove a decades-old mathematical conjecture. Focuses on advanced reasoning and math.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 推理团队研究员。以主导达到 IMO 金牌水平的模型工作、以及用通用模型协助推翻一个存在数十年的数学猜想而知名。专注高级推理与数学。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Math Breakthrough: The Story Behind the Discovery

people.tiZh: MCP 联合创造者 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Co-creator of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Anthropic, the open standard that connects AI models to external tools and data. An engineer focused on the plumbing that lets agents act reliably in the real world.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 的 Model Context Protocol（MCP）联合创造者——连接 AI 模型与外部工具、数据的开放标准。专注让智能体在现实世界中可靠行动的底层工程。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic Donates MCP to Linux Foundation: Standardizing AI-Application Connections

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and a lead architect of GPT-3 during his time at OpenAI. He focuses on AI safety, alignment and responsible scaling, and speaks candidly about AGI timelines and the risks that keep him up at night.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，在 OpenAI 期间是 GPT-3 的主要架构者之一。他专注于 AI 安全、对齐与负责任扩展，常坦率谈论 AGI 时间表与令他担忧的风险。

episodes.tEn: The Last Invention: Ben Mann on AGI by 2028, AI Safety, and the Future of Humanity

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Researcher at OpenAI who helped build Canvas, Tasks and the o1 chain-of-thought models. Previously at Anthropic, where she led post-training and evaluation for the Claude 3 family. Writes on model behavior and why soft skills matter in an AI world.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究员，参与打造 Canvas、Tasks 与 o1 思维链模型。此前在 Anthropic 主导 Claude 3 系列的后训练与评测。关注模型行为，以及 AI 时代为何软技能愈发重要。

episodes.tEn: Building the Cutting Edge: Inside OpenAI with Karina Nguyen

people.tiZh: OpenAI 机器人与硬件负责人
people.bioEn: Leads robotics and hardware at OpenAI. Previously led hardware for the Meta AR glasses and Oculus VR, and engineered products at Apple. A champion of physical AI, bringing intelligence into the physical world.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 机器人与硬件负责人。此前领导 Meta AR 眼镜与 Oculus VR 硬件，并曾在苹果做产品工程。她倡导物理 AI——让智能进入物理世界。

episodes.tEn: From VR to Robotics: The Next Frontier in Physical AI

people.tiZh: AngelList 联合创始人；天使投资人与思想者
people.bioEn: Co-founder of AngelList and one of tech's most-quoted thinkers on wealth, leverage and happiness. An early investor in Uber and Twitter, he now hosts the Naval podcast and writes on how AI reshapes work and startups.
people.bioZh: AngelList 联合创始人，科技圈被引用最多的思想者之一，谈财富、杠杆与幸福。Uber、Twitter 早期投资人，现主持 Naval 播客，探讨 AI 如何重塑工作与创业。

Naval Podcast: Building Factories for AI, Supersonic Jets, and Brain Interfaces
Naval on Sales: Credibility Over Tactics
Naval on Flat Organizations and AI's Implicit Role
Vibe Coding: The End of iPhone Dominance?
Vibe Coding: The New Product Management

Why Founders Must Own Recruiting, Fundraising, Strategy, and Product Vision
Naval on Learning by Doing and Contextual Principles
Happiness vs. Success: Two Paths to Fulfillment
